title: Dreamscene Fleece Throw Blanket for Sofa, Super Soft Warm Cosy Plain Blush Pink Throw Blanket for Bed Fluffy Single Bedspread Polar Fleece Blankets, 120 x 150cm
features: Single Throw for Bed: The delicate blush pink shade adds a soft, calming touch to any room, easily complementing a variety of home décor styles and creating a peaceful, inviting atmosphere.
120 x 150cm: This fleece throw is the perfect size for single beds, sofas or as a smaller bedspread, providing cosy warmth and style for any space.

Lightweight & Breathable: Enjoy the warmth without the weight. This lightweight fleece blanket is breathable and comfortable, making it perfect for year-round use, whether you need extra warmth in the winter or a light cover in warmer months.

Super Soft & Cosy Comfort: Made from premium polar fleece 100% polyester, the blush pink throw blanket offers an incredibly soft, warm and fluffy texture, perfect for lounging on the sofa or adding a cosy layer to your bed.

Durable & Easy to Care For: Machine washable at 40°C for easy maintenance, this fleece throw retains its softness, vibrant colour and fluffy texture even after multiple washes, ensuring long-lasting durability and hassle-free care.
